identity.title: Visual Identity
identity.subtitle: AI-generated from your photos
identity.uploadHint: Upload 1–2 photos of your space + 1–2 showing guests or activity — the more life in the photos, the better the AI analysis.
identity.noPhotos: Upload photos of your business, and AI will extract your visual style, color palette, and photography guidelines.
identity.errorNoPhotos: Please upload at least 1 photo first.
